2605.25250.title: LipoAgent: Coordinating Fine-Tuned LLM Agents for Safer Lipid Design
2605.25250.paper_summary: Lipid nanoparticles (LNPs) are among the most clinically mature platforms for nucleic acid delivery, yet designing lipids that are both effective and biologically safe remains a major bottleneck. In practical screening, toxicity is a decision-level constraint: if a lipid is toxic, its efficiency prediction is clinically irrelevant. We propose LipoAgent, a safety-aware multi-agent LLM framework for lipid discovery. LipoAgent combines domain-specific finetuning with a conditional prediction objective that enforces toxicity as a prerequisite for efficiency prediction, and further improves reliability via multi-agent verification with lightweight human oversight when disagreement persists. Across multiple foundation models, LipoAgent achieves an average 32% relative improvement in mRNA transfection efficiency prediction compared with other reported models for lipid design. Wet-lab validation confirms that virtual screening rankings reliably translate to biological transfection outcomes. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/SAI-Lab-NYU/LipoAgent.git.
2605.25250.paper_summary_zh: 脂質納米顆粒（LNPs）是核酸傳遞中最臨床成熟的平台之一，但設計既有效又具生物安全性的脂質仍然是一個主要瓶頸。在實際篩選中，毒性是一個決策層面的限制：如果一種脂質是有毒的，那麼其效率預測在臨床上就不具相關性。我們提出了LipoAgent，一個安全意識的多代理LLM框架，用於脂質發現。LipoAgent結合了特定領域的微調和一個條件預測目標，將毒性作為效率預測的前提，並通過在持續存在分歧時進行輕量級人類監督的多代理驗證進一步提高可靠性。在多個基礎模型中，LipoAgent在mRNA轉染效率預測方面相比其他報告的脂質設計模型實現了平均32%的相對提升。濕實驗驗證確認虛擬篩選排名可靠地轉化為生物轉染結果。代碼可在 https://github.com/SAI-Lab-NYU/LipoAgent.git 上公開獲得。
2605.25250.author: Leshu Li et.al.
2605.25250.authors: Leshu Li, An Lu, Haiyu Wang, Zhibin Feng, Conghui Duan, Qing Bao, Zongmin Zhao, Sai Qian Zhang
